name: Fan - ii
description:
Following his debut in Inanimate Insanity, he returned and was a contestant in Inanimate Insanity II until his elimination in Mine Your Own Business, placing 7th overall.

He later competed in Inanimate Insanity Invitationaluntil his elimination in The Shame of the Name, after Cabby rallied the rest of The Pinkers, except Test Tube, together to blindside him. He left Indefinite Island early, not participating in either rejoin challenge coming in 18th place.

In Inanimate Insanity IV, Fan is very concerned with the state of the new society that had been formed. After a pitch to the Organization of Sensible Careers, Fan was declared the "Games Moderator" of the up and coming return of the game. He proceeds to moderate the games soon after meeting Poppy. However, in "Fan the Flames", Fan is gravely injured by lightning while trying to intercept MeTag in order to protect Bot, leading OJ to temporarily take his place. He is voiced by Brian Koch.

ADVERTISEMENT

Appearance

Fan is a red Chinese foldable paper fan. His body is shaped like an upside-down triangle with two yellow sticks at either side. The red paper makes several folds on his body, causing triangular bumps at the top. At the bottom, the red paper twists.
creator: Oscgeekfreek
